calendar.matters:
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Carl Edward Olson, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Emily Sismour.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 610 Cole St., #204, San Francisco, San Francisco, CA. 94117
Back-due rent and damages $4,018.16
The Lease is forfeited.
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Carl Edward Olson is present.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Emily Sismour is not present.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of October 01, 2012 remains on calendar.
